homepage.text_excerpt: Chris Ward | MP for Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven Skip to content Home News Job Openings Contact Twitter Home News Job Openings Contact Donate Twitter MP for Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven Thank you to everyone who voted, campaigned and supported us. It’s an enormous honour and responsibility to serve the community and Party I love. I’ll work hard to deliver the change we need across Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven. Photo: Andrew Gardner / The Argus Working hard for Brighton Kemptown and Peacehaven. Here’s my priorities for us. Get our economy working for you Rebuild the NHS and cut waiting lists Crack down on anti-social behaviour Recruit more teachers in our local schools Build more family homes and tackle sky-high rents Latest News General News Chris Ward MP welcomes landmark Renters’ Rights Act coming into force April 30, 2026 Read More Chris Ward MP welcomes landmark Renters’ Rights Act coming into force Continue General News Chris Ward MP supports Bowel Cancer Awareness Month April 15, 2026 April 30, 2026 Read More Chris Ward MP supports Bowel Cancer Awareness Month Continue General News Chris Ward MP welcomes progress from Royal Mail to improve deliveries across the constituency April 10, 2026 April 30, 2026 Read More Chris Ward MP welcomes progress from Royal Mail to improve deliveries across the constituency Continue Read more news > Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp · 29 Apr 2049562048183287895 I am sickened and appalled by the attack in Golders Green this morning. My thoughts are with the Jewish community. Antisemitism has no place in our country, and we must confront and stamp out this poison wherever it appears. Twitter feed video. The World at One @BBCWorldatOne Two Jewish men have been seriously injured after being stabbed in Golders Green, London. Chris Ward, Parliamentary Secretary in the Cabinet Office, says there must be a 'cultural change' to stamp out antisemitism Reply on Twitter 2049562048183287895 Retweet on Twitter 2049562048183287895 0 Like on Twitter 2049562048183287895 2 X 2049562048183287895 Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp · 28 Apr 2049113686300581974 I’m so proud of our club and how forward thinking we are. This will be a massive boost for the women’s game and shows @BHAFC and @BHAFCWomen leading the way once again. Can’t wait to see it built and up and running! Brighton & Hove Albion @OfficialBHAFC We are pleased to confirm plans for the UK and Europe's first purpose-built women's football stadium. 🏟️ It will be one of only three such stadiums in the world, putting the club at the forefront of the women's game globally. 🤩💫 Reply on Twitter 2049113686300581974 Retweet on Twitter 2049113686300581974 1 Like on Twitter 2049113686300581974 4 X 2049113686300581974 Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp · 30 Mar 2038531492385538374 Ten years on from Brexit - this is Labour’s chance to finally reset our relationship with the EU My article for @thefabians and @LabourList ‘Labour is rebuilding our relationship with Europe while restoring Britain’ – LabourList In June, it will be 10 years since the Brexit referendum. At the time, I was a political advisor to the relatively new Labour MP… labourlist.org Reply on Twitter 2038531492385538374 Retweet on Twitter 2038531492385538374 14 Like on Twitter 2038531492385538374 49 X 2038531492385538374 Chris Ward MP @chriswardmp · 28 Mar 2037889125420802297 This 👇👇👇 Rachel Reeves @RachelReevesMP I’ve long believed in the power of procurement. It can strengthen Britain's critical industrial resilience as part of what I call 'securonomics'. And applying a new 'public interest test' for contracting decisions will strengthen our public services. https://www.theguardian.com/business/2026/mar/26/british-suppliers-to-be-prioritised-for-contracts-in-sectors-vital-to-national-security?CMP=Share_iOSApp_Other Reply on Twitter 2037889125420802297 Retweet on Twitter 2037889125420802297 0 Like on Twitter 2037889125420802297 1 X 2037889125420802297 Load More About Chri
